problems_encountered.description: Initial attempt failed with invalid SSH public key format (example key was rejected with 400 error). Resolved by generating valid ed25519 keypair.

tool_response_summary: Successfully created SSH user with ID 5a0b06c1-b361-47dc-8735-d20319feaa08. Username assigned: ssh-qsqdul. User is active and configured with ed25519 public key authentication.
execution_notes: Tool requires valid SSH public key. After providing correctly formatted ed25519 key, creation succeeded immediately. User created at 2025-12-18T23:26:27.860Z with description 'Eval test SSH user for feature 014'.
